name: Hershey's Low Fat Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly spray two 9x5x3-inch loaf pans with non-stick vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a small bowl, stir together sour cream and baking soda; set aside.
4. In a large bowl, beat sugar and margarine on medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended.
5. Add egg substitute and salt; beat well.
6. Gradually add flour to the sugar mixture, beating until well combined.
7. Add sour cream mixture, mashed bananas, and vanilla; beat until smooth.
8. Fold in chocolate chips and nuts.
9. Pour batter evenly into prepared pans.
10. Bake 45 to 55 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Allow cooling for 10 minutes before removing from pans and wrapping in plastic wrap.
12. Cool completely before slicing.
